title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS518-16XS-2XQ-RM
description: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS518-16XS-2XQ-RM is a feature-packed backbone switch for your network and features 2Ã QSFP28 (100 Gbps), 16Ã SFP28 (1/10/25 Gbps), one 10/100Mbps metal port intended only for management, console RJ45 port, two Hot-Swap power modules and four Hot-Swap fans. The switch thus provides a total throughput of 600 Gbps, a switching capacity of 1.2 Tbps, forwarding up to 600 Mpps for most common packets and, thanks to the Marvell Prestera Aldrin2 switch chip, also L3… CRS518-16XS-2XQ-RM has two Hot-Swap power modules with redundancy option . In the event of a power failure on the primary source, the function can be replaced by the second source, which is already ready at that moment. So the failure of one resource will not endanger the operation of your network Device (2) power cord Mounts for 19" rack
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (16) 1G/10G/25Gbps + (2) 100Gbps Serial port RJ45 USB Yes Power Power type Mains power (230V) Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 45 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount "U" positions 1 Fans Yes Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 443 Height [mm] 45 Depth [mm] 265 Hardware CPU QCA9531 CPU frequency [MHz] 650 CPU cores 1 Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 64 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 1200 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 600
